narrative: Dollar retreats as President Trump cancels a planned strike on Iran — gold lower -0.31%; equities -0.07%; DXY +0.05%; VIX 18.2. USD/JPY firmed to 159.08 on a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage, though a -1.66 25d RR put skew signals heavy downside hedging. AUD/USD fell to 0.7119 as RBA minutes signaled a pause, while GBP/USD IV at 11.0% vs HV30 7.6% shows a 3.4pt VRP as markets pay for protection. Watch Canada CPI at 12:30 UTC for BoC rate guidance.
